warnings: Performance warnings for bundle size (expected, not blocking)

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP structure remain synced after fixes. Card changes only affect parts/card-search.php template (used by PHP). Dropdown arrow CSS applies to both editor and frontend select elements. Section wrapper, container, heading, and search-inner all match between TSX and PHP.

testPage.notes: Existing test page unchanged - fixes applied to card template and styles only

fixesApplied.userRequest: Make the whole card background change on hover, keep the border black
fixesApplied.description: Card hover only changed border color to accent, did not change background. Border should remain charcoal (black).

changes.notes: Replaced hover:border-accent with group-hover:bg-accent to change entire card background on hover. Added group-hover:text-charcoal to ensure text remains readable. Border remains border-charcoal (not changed on hover).

changes.change: Added group-hover:bg-white/80 group-hover:border-charcoal/20 transition-colors to post type pill
changes.notes: Pill adapts to card hover state similar to resource card pattern. Background lightens, border adapts on hover.
Extended transition to include background-color and color for smooth hover animation.

changes.change: Added btn-tertiary hover overrides for card context
changes.notes: Ensures Learn More button maintains charcoal color when card background changes to accent on hover. Suppresses underline in card context. Pattern from Archive block resource/policy cards.

fixesApplied.verification: Card now changes entire background to accent color on hover. Border remains charcoal. Pill and button text remain readable with appropriate contrast.

fixesApplied.userRequest: It's missing the arrows on the filter dropdowns
fixesApplied.description: Filter-by-post-type dropdown and per-page selector were missing visible chevron/arrow icons. Global forms.css uses bg-none! which wipes background images.

changes.change: Added dropdown arrow CSS for .search select elements
changes.implementation: background-image: url(data:image/svg+xml with charcoal chevron) !important; background-repeat: no-repeat !important; background-position: right 16px center !important; background-size: 12px !important;
changes.notes: Uses !important to override global forms.css bg-none!important. Chevron is charcoal (#1f1f1d) to match light mode theme. 12px size, positioned 16px from right edge per Archive pattern.

fixesApplied.verification: Both filter-by dropdown and per-page selector now display charcoal chevron arrows. Arrows visible in light mode context (Search block uses light background, not dark like Archive).

implementationNotes.cardHover: Card hover pattern now matches resource card pattern: entire background changes to accent color, text changes to charcoal for contrast, pill adapts with lighter background. Border remains charcoal (black) throughout. Smooth transitions on all color properties.
implementationNotes.dropdownArrows: Dropdown arrows use SVG data URI with charcoal stroke color (#1f1f1d) appropriate for light mode. Archive block uses white stroke for dark mode. Both use !important to override global forms.css background:none!important.
implementationNotes.pillHover: Post type pill uses group-hover:bg-white/80 and group-hover:border-charcoal/20 to adapt when card background changes. Same pattern as resource card taxonomy pills.
implementationNotes.btnTertiaryOverride: Added CSS rules to prevent btn-tertiary from changing to white/light color on hover within card context. Maintains charcoal color for readability against accent background. Same override pattern used in Archive block for resource/policy cards.
implementationNotes.tsxPhpSync: Card template changes only affect PHP rendering (parts/card-search.php). TSX uses FilteredServerSideRender which previews the PHP output. CSS changes apply to both editor and frontend. No structural changes to block wrapper or container.
implementationNotes.colorContrast: Charcoal text on accent background meets WCAG AA contrast requirements. Pill white/80 background on accent provides visual separation. Learn More button charcoal color maintained for readability.

verificationSteps: Build compiled successfully with no errors (performance warnings only)
TSX/PHP structure sync verified - section, container, heading, search-inner all match
Card hover verified: background changes to accent, border remains charcoal, text changes to charcoal
Pill hover verified: background lightens to white/80, border adapts to charcoal/20
Dropdown arrows verified: charcoal chevrons visible on both filter-by and per-page selects
CSS transitions verified: smooth animation on background-color, border-color, and color
btn-tertiary override verified: Learn More button maintains charcoal color on card hover
